questions.question: Which two QoS tools are used to guarantee minimum bandwidth to certain traffic? (Choose two)
A network administrator must enable DHCP services between two sites. What must be configured for the router to pass DHCPDISCOVER messages on to the server?
What does a router do when configured with the default DNS lookup settings, and a URL is entered on the CLI?

options.A: initiates a ping request to the URL
options.B: prompts the user to specify the desired IP address
options.C: continuously attempts to resolve the URL until the command is cancelled
options.D: sends a broadcast message in an attempt to resolve the URL

questions.question:
Refer to exhibit.
Which configuration must be applied to the router that configures PAT to translate all addresses in VLAN 200 while allowing devices on VLAN 100 to use their own IP addresses?
Which protocol does an IPv4 host use to obtain a dynamically assigned IP address?
Which condition must be met before an NMS handles an SNMP trap from an agent?

options.A: The NMS must be configured on the same router as the SNMP agent
options.B: The NMS must receive a trap and an inform message from the SNMP agent within a configured interval
options.C: The NMS software must be loaded with the MIB associated with the trap
options.D: The NMS must receive the same trap from two different SNMP agents to verify that it is reliable

questions.question:
Refer to the exhibit.
The ntp server 192.168.0.3 command has been configured on Router1 to make it an NTP client of router 2. Which command must be configured on Router2 so that it operates in server-only mode and relies only on its internal clock?
When DHCP is configured on a router, which command must be entered so the default gateway is automatically distributed?
When deploying syslog, which severity level logs informational message?
Which two QoS tools provides congestion management? (Choose two)
An engineering team asks an implementer to configure syslog for warning conditions and error conditions. Which command does the implementer configure to achieve the desired result?
Which level of severity must be set to get informational syslogs?
A network analyst is tasked with configured the date and time on a router using EXEC mode. The date must be set to 12:00am. Which command should be used?
Which protocol requires authentication to transfer a backup configuration file from a router to a remote server?
When a client and server are not on the same physical network, which device is used to forward requests and replies between client and server for DHCP?
Which QoS tool can you use to optimize voice traffic on a network that is primarily intended for data traffic?
On workstations running Microsoft Windows, which protocol provides the default gateway for the device?
How does QoS optimize voice traffic?

options.C: by differentiating voice and video traffic

questions.question: In QoS, which prioritization method is appropriate for interactive voice and video?

An engineer is configuring data and voice services to pass through the same port. The designated switch interface fastethernet0/1 must transmit packets using the same priority for data when they are received from the access port of the IP phone. Which configuration must be used?

options.A:
interface fastethernet0/1
switchport priority extend cos 7
options.B:
interface fastethernet0/1
switchport voice vlan untagged
options.C:
interface fastethernet0/1
switchport voice vlan dot1p
options.D:
interface fastethernet0/1
switchport priority extend trust

questions.question: What is a syslog facility?

options.A: host that is configured for the system to send log messages
options.B: password that authenticates a Network Management System to receive log messages
options.C: group of log messages associated with the configured severity level
options.D: set of values that represent the processes that can generate a log message

questions.question: What is a capability of FTP in network management operations?

options.A: uses separate control and data connections to move files between server and client
options.B: devices are directly connected and use UDP to pass file information
options.C: encrypts data before sending between data resources
options.D: offers proprietary support at the session layer when transferring data

questions.question: What is a DNS lookup operation?

options.B: DNS server pings the destination to verify that it is available
options.C: DNS server forwards the client to an alternate IP address when the primary IP is down
options.D: responds to a request for IP address to domain name resolution to the DNS server

questions.question:
Refer to the exhibit.
The DHCP server and clients are connected to the same switch. What is the next step to complete the DHCP configuration to allow clients on VLAN 1 to receive addresses from the DHCP server?

options.A: Configure the ip dhcp snooping trust command on the interface that is connected to the DHCP server
options.B: Configure the ip dhcp relay information option command on the interface that is connected to the DHCP server
options.C: Configure the ip dhcp relay information option command on the interface that is connected to the DHCP client
options.D: Configure the ip dhcp snooping trust command on the interface that is connected to the DHCP client

questions.question:
Refer to the exhibit.
Which plan must be implemented to ensure optimal QoS marking practices on this network?

options.A: As traffic enters from the access layer on SW1 and SW2, trust all traffic markings
options.B: Trust the IP phone markings on SW1 and mark traffic entering SW2 at SW2
options.C: As traffic traverses MLS1 remark the traffic, but trust all markings at the access layer
options.D: Remark traffic as it traverses R1 and trust all markings at the access layer

questions.question:
Refer to the exhibit.
Which configuration enables DHCP addressing for hosts connected to interface FastEthernet0/1 on router R4?

options.A:
interface FastEthernet0/1
ip helper-address 10.0.1.1
!
access-list 100 permit tcp host 10.0.1.1 eq 67 host 10.148.2.1
options.B:
interface FastEthernet0/0 
ip helper-address 10.0.1.1
!
access-list 100 permit host 10.0.1.1 host 10.148.2.1 eq bootps
options.C:
interface FastEthernet0/0 
ip helper-address 10.0.1.1
! 
access-list 100 permit udp host 10.0.1.1 eq bootps host 10.148.2.1
options.D:
interface FastEthernet0/1 
ip helper-address 10.0.1.1
! 
access-list 100 permit udp host 10.0.1.1 eq bootps host 10.148.2.1

questions.question:
Refer to the exhibit.
How should the configuration be updated to allow PC1 and PC2 access to the Internet?

options.A: Modify the configured number of the second access list
options.B: Remove the overload keyword from the ip nat inside source command
options.C: Add either the ip nat {inside|outside} command under both interfaces
options.D: Change the ip nat inside source command to use interface GtgabitEthernet0/0

questions.question: What is the purpose of the ip address dhcp command?

options.A: to configure an interface as a DHCP server
options.B: to configure an interface as a DHCP relay
options.C: to configure an interface as a DHCP helper
options.D: to configure an interface as a DHCP client

questions.question:
R1 as an NTP server must have:
* NTP authentication enabled
* NTP packets sourced from Interface loopback 0
* NTP stratum 2
* NTP packets only permitted to client IP 209.165.200.225
How should R1 be configured?

An engineer is configuring a new router on the network and applied this configuration. Which additional configuration allows the PC to obtain its IP address from a DHCP server?

options.A: Configure the ip dhcp relay information command under interface Gi0/1
options.B: Configure the ip dhcp smart-relay command globally on the router
options.C: Configure the ip helper-address 172.16.2.2 command under interface Gi0/0
options.D: Configure the ip address dhcp command under interface Gi0/0

questions.question: Which QoS per-hop behavior changes the value of the ToS field in the IPv4 packet header?

Users on existing VLAN 100 can reach sites on the Internet. Which action must the administrator take to establish connectivity to the Internet for users in VLAN 200?

options.A: Define a NAT pool on the router.
options.C: Configure the ip nat outside command on another interface for VLAN 200
options.D: Configure static NAT translations for VLAN 200

questions.question: Which QoS traffic handling technique retains excess packets in a queue and reschedules these packets for later transmission when the configured maximum bandwidth has been surpassed?
Which QoS queuing method discards or marks packets that exceed the desired bit rate of traffic flow?
How does TFTP operate in a network?

options.A: relies on the well-known TCP port 20 to transmit data
options.B: requires two separate connections for control and data traffic
options.C: uses block numbers to identify and mitigate data-transfer errors

questions.question: An engineer is configuring switch SW1 to act as an NTP server when all upstream NTP server connectivity fails. Which configuration must be used?

options.A:
SW1# config t
SW1(config)#ntp server 192.168.1.1
SW1(config)#ntp access-group server accesslist1
options.B:
SW1# config t
SW1(config)3 ntp peer 192.168.1.1
SW1(config)#ntp access-group peer accesslist1
options.C:
SW1# config t
SW1(config)#ntp backup
SW1(config)#ntp server 192.168.1.1
options.D:
SW1# config t
SW1(config)#ntp master
SW1(config)#ntp server 192.168.1.1

questions.question: What is a function performed by a web server?

options.A: provide an application that is transmitted over HTTP
options.B: send and retrieve email from client devices
options.C: securely store files for FTP access
options.D: authenticate and authorize a user’s identity

questions.question: What is a feature of TFTP?

options.B: relies on the well-known TCP port 20 to transmit data
options.C: uses two separate connections for control and data traffic

questions.question: Which command creates a static NAT binding for a PC address of 10.1.1.1 to the public routable address 209.165.200.225 assigned to the PC?
Which command implies the use of SNMPv3?
What are two features of the DHCP relay agent? (Choose two)

options.A: minimizes the necessary number of DHCP servers
options.B: assigns DNS locally and then forwards request to DHCP server
options.C: is configured under the Layer 3 interface of a router on the client subnet
options.D: allows only MAC-to-IP reservations to determine the local subnet of a client
options.E: permits one IP helper command under an individual Layer 3 interface

questions.question:
Refer to the exhibit.
Which router or router group are NTP clients?

options.C:
R2 and R3 
D R1, R3, and R4

questions.question:
Refer to the exhibit.
Which command set configures ROUTER-1 to allow Internet access for users on the 192.168.1.0/24 subnet while using 209.165.202.129 for Port Address Translation?

options.A:
ip nat pool CCNA 192.168.0.0 192.168.1.255 netmask 255.255.255.0
access-list 10 permit 192.168.0.0 0.0.0.255 
ip nat inside source list 10 pool CCNA overload
options.B:
ip nat pool CCNA 209.165.202.129 209.165.202.129 netmask 255.255.255.255
access-list 10 permit 192.168.1.0 255.255.255.0 
ip nat inside source list 10 pool CCNA overload
options.C:
ip nat pool CCNA 192.168.0.0 192.168.1.255 netmask 255.255.255.0
access-list 10 permit 192.168.0.0 255.255.255.0 
ip nat inside source list 10 pool CCNA overload
options.D:
ip nat pool CCNA 209.165.202.129 209.165.202.129 netmask 255.255.255.255
access-list 10 permit 192.168.1.0 0.0.0.255 
ip nat inside source list 10 pool CCNA overload
